description: This file contains SCSS mixins for styling button variants, outline variants, and sizes, used for generating button styles with different states and sizes in a CSS preprocessor context.

methods.name: button-variant
methods.description: Mixin for generating button styles with different states such as default, hover, active, and disabled.

methods.name: button-outline-variant
methods.description: Mixin for generating outline style button variants with different states.

methods.name: button-size
methods.description: Mixin for setting button size parameters like padding, font size, and border radius.
